purpose: Truth matrix for the yaml-sanity verdict classifier. Each cell maps a file shape to the verdict the classifier MUST return per the spec. Wired into scripts/test-yaml-sanity-verdicts.sh.

notes.cell-16-prose-colon-between-body-rules: Conservative by design: Pattern 2 flags prose 'Word: text' lines between body rules as YAML-key-like. False-positive SKIP (Class-A finding), never a wrong write. Pinned so future heuristic changes are explicit truth-matrix changes.
notes.test-data/f26-repro.md: Truth follows the v0.1.4 W4 priority ladder: the divergent created-collision (2024-03-14 vs 2025-01-01) dominates the beta shape.
notes.INVALID_YAML: No deterministic cell — the verdict covers the residual 'patterns OK but parser fails' class, which has no canonical byte-shape. Documented limitation.
